cards.back: A well-defined procedure that takes some input and produces a corresponding output, typically using a series of finite steps.
The process of finding a solution to a problem by breaking it down into smaller sub-problems and solving each sub-problem using an algorithm.
The data or information that an algorithm uses to produce output.
The result or answer produced by an algorithm as a response to the input.
A set of well-defined instructions that an algorithm follows to solve a problem or perform a task.
